creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
Hi,

I thought, in general we prefer something like

MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rrr.de/~riggs/freesbie/ \
		${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL:S/%SUBDIR%/delphij/}

over the PR's suggestion:

MASTER_SITES=	http://www.rrr.de/~riggs/freesbie/
MASTER_SITES+=	${MASTER_SITE_LOCAL:S/%SUBDIR%/delphij/}

But besides that, everything looks alright. I uploaded this tarball to
my site as well.

Thanks and approved,
Riggs

-- 
- "[...] I talked to the computer at great length and
-- explained my view of the Universe to it" said Marvin.
--- And what happened?" pressed Ford.
---- "It committed suicide." said Marvin.
